source_jobs.title: Technical Digital Content Writer
source_jobs.description:
Graphite is a technology-enabled growth agency that helps fast growing companies like Masterclass, Notion, and BetterUp unlock sustainable revenue through content and SEO. We’re obsessed with impact— it’s foundational to who we are, why we’re successful, and how we approach delivering outcomes for clients and ultimately, everyone on the internet. We are a fully distributed company with team members located across North America, Latin America, and Europe. Come join us and help us create the best content, everywhere that matters.



We’re looking for our Content Technical Writer who will be responsible for producing engaging and premium content that prioritizes our targeted audiences. This is a remote based contract and not an offer for employment.



What you’ll do

 - Create impactful, objective-oriented content for our clients and brands.

 - Research, brainstorm, and pitch creative and compelling article topics

 - Fact-check, proofread, and edit content for accuracy and comprehensiveness

 - Work with our internal teams to identify opportunities and plan improvements to existing content and internal processes



What you'll need

 - 2+ years of experience in development or engineering, or writing about these topics

 - Experience with APIs and databases

 - Familiarity with prompt engineering, agentic workflows, MCP integrations, rules files, and how to structure context for AI coding assistants

 - Experience writing about low-code and fair-code

 - Excellent writing and communication skills.

 - Able to absorb new material quickly.

 - Proven ability to manage projects and juggle a diverse workload.

 - Ability to meet any and all deadlines.

 - Skilled with Google Workspace applications (primarily Docs, Slides, and Sheets).

Plus skills

 - Experience working in a startup or agency environment.

 - Past experience working in a content management system is helpful.

 - SEO experience with topic selection, keywords, title tags, meta descriptions.



How we’ll help

Graphite’s mission is to create an environment where you build the best work of your career. In order to facilitate this, we provide:

 - Process As Needed - We view the process as a way to empower better work, not as a series of dogmatic rules. We develop the best internal processes the same way we develop products - through iteration, measurement, and continuous improvement.

 - Autonomy - We trust you to be excellent at what you do. We will provide as much support as needed when needed, but no more. You will have autonomy and agency to drive projects forward, and own decisions and outcomes.

 - Flexible Work Environment - Everyone’s optimal work style is unique. We operate as a distributed team across the US, Canada, Latin America and Europe. We optimize for productivity and performance, not time spent in an office. Help us build an optimal work environment that fits you as an individual.

 - Compensation - We want to work with the best people in the World and compensate accordingly.

Graphite provides equal employment opportunities to all qualified individuals without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, pregnancy, age, national origin, physical or mental disability, military or veteran status, genetic information, or any other protected classification.

source_jobs.title: SEO/AEO Growth Lead
source_jobs.description:
Graphite is a technology-enabled growth agency that helps fast-growing companies like Masterclass, Notion, and BetterUp unlock sustainable revenue through content, SEO, and AEO.

We’re obsessed with impact— it’s foundational to who we are, why we’re successful, and how we approach delivering outcomes for clients and ultimately, everyone on the internet. We are a fully distributed company with team members located across North America, Latin America, and Europe.

The rapid growth of our technology-enabled agency business has put us in an exciting position to grow our team of strategic accounts, which has been foundational to our agency's success.

As a result, we are eagerly searching for an experienced Growth Lead (SEO + AEO + Content) with a strong academic background in business or any STEM-related major to support our growth. This role requires you to be resourceful, creative, and persistent to make growth marketing a successful strategic initiative for partners.

You are obsessed with learning and developing new skills. You feel comfortable taking full ownership of your projects and working in a performance-driven environment while cultivating a strong sense of teamwork and collaboration.

Come join us and help us create the best content, everywhere that matters!


This is a fully remote work opportunity.

What you’ll do:

 - Work collaboratively on complex, large-scale, time-critical SEO/AEO projects

 - Forecast performance set targets, build reporting, and communicate pacing towards targets

 - Monitor the performance of top consumer tech companies we work with and their competitors

 - Analyze digital marketing campaigns and website performance, identify trends, and provide recommendations

 - Conduct A/B tests that optimize the overall marketing program

 - Craft compelling business cases for growth marketing projects, including opportunity sizing with Analytics and Finance teams

 - Identify, evaluate, and prioritize scalable web platforms and page-level SEO projects based on traffic and revenue growth opportunities

 - Coordinate with data science to perform analysis on organic traffic changes.

What expertise you’ll need:

 - SEO + AEO + Content: 4+ years of agency or in-house experience with technical SEO, and content strategy, and/or general experience and awareness of the digital marketing space, including paid search, SEO, AEO, social, some digital marketing strategies, etc. Programmatic SEO is a huge plus!

 - Data Analysis: Exceptional data analysis skills (you are the go-to spreadsheet person on your team)

 - Paid Search: Either agency or in-house experience with PPC, SEM, paid search, and paid ads.

 - Product: Excellent product sense and solving challenging problems with simple, elegant product solutions

 - Web & App: Strong understanding of how the web and native app ecosystems work

 - Tools: Experience working with several data and product tools (Google Analytics, Excel, Data Studio, Amplitude, SEMRush, Ahrefs, Asana, Jira, etc.)

 - People management: Experience overseeing and managing a team of direct collaborators

 - Project Management: Experience in managing client deliverables promptly. Leveraging communications to ensure all strategies and deliverables will be delivered on time. 

What you’ll learn:

 - Programmatic SEO: Beyond best practices, we build SEO engines that scale. Indexation and architectural components, testing infrastructure, and high-quality dynamically created local and marketplace content that fulfills the user’s intent

 - Premium Data-Driven Content: Data-driven approaches often lead to heavily optimized mediocrity. Premium approaches often lead to beautiful content with an uncertain return on investment. Often, companies either have low-quality data-driven content or premium content based on intuition. We use proprietary technology that leverages data to quantify the largest opportunities within the content and combine this with a premium editorial style guide to produce con

source_jobs.title: VP, Paid
source_jobs.description:
Graphite is a technology-enabled growth agency that helps fast-growing companies like Webflow, Calm, and Notion unlock sustainable revenue through content, SEO, and AEO.

We are a fully distributed company with a global team located across North America, Latin America, and Europe.

We're obsessed with impact. It's foundational to who we are, why we're successful, and how we approach delivering outcomes for clients and ultimately, everyone on the internet.

We're building a new service line: Paid AEO. As AI answer engines reshape how people discover products, paid placement inside them is wide open, and Paid AEO sits much closer to our core AEO expertise than to traditional paid search. We're looking for a senior leader to stand this practice up from the ground up, prove it with our clients, and grow it into a team.

You'll start with the paid channels closest to our AEO core: ChatGPT Ads, where there's almost no competition and a real chance to become the best in the category, plus Reddit Ads and YouTube Ads, which increasingly shape what AI answer engines surface. From there you'll expand into the broader paid landscape.

This opportunity is full-time and remote, and is open to candidates based in the United States.

What you'll do:

• Stand up and own Graphite's Paid AEO practice, starting with ChatGPT Ads, Reddit Ads, and YouTube Ads.

• Expand the practice into the broader paid landscape, building out our offering for paid search, paid social, and affiliates.

• Cross-sell Paid AEO into our existing client base and help win new business on the strength of it.

• Build, hire, and lead the paid team as the practice scales.

• Partner directly with our leadership to shape the strategy and positioning of the function.

• Present strategy, insights, and results to client executives, and bring the case studies that make the pitch land.

What expertise you'll need:

• 8+ years leading paid media (paid search, paid social, or programmatic) at scale, in-house or at a top agency, with results you can point to.

• A track record of building, not just optimizing. You've stood up a channel, function, or team from scratch.

• Senior executive presence. You can win large accounts and keep them.

• A bias to ship and comfort with ambiguity. Paid AEO is brand new and there's no playbook yet.

• Strong data fluency and command of growth marketing tools (Google Analytics, Google Ads, SEMRush, Ahrefs, etc).

How we’ll help:

Graphite’s mission is to create an environment where you build the best work of your career. To facilitate this, we provide:

 - Process As Needed - We view the process as a way to empower better work, not as a series of dogmatic rules. We develop the best internal processes as we do products - through iteration, measurement, and continuous improvement

 - Autonomy - We trust you to be excellent at what you do. We will provide as much support as needed when needed, but no more. You will have autonomy and agency to drive projects forward, and own decisions and outcomes

 - Flexible Work Environment - Flexible Work Environment - Everyone’s optimal work style is unique. We operate as a distributed team across the United States, Canada, Latin America, and Europe. We optimize for productivity and performance, not time spent in an office. Help us build an optimal work environment that fits you as an individual

 - Compensation - We want to work with the best people in the World and compensate accordingly

 - Vacation & Time Off - To be the best version of yourself, you need time to recharge. We offer flexible PTO. Take time when you need it

 - Benefits - We will ensure you have quality healthcare coverage and opportunities to further your education

Graphite provides equal employment opportunities to all qualified individuals without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, pregnancy, age, national origin, physical or mental disability, military or veteran status, genetic information, or any o

source_jobs.title: Content Specialist
source_jobs.description:
Graphite is a technology-enabled growth agency that helps fast-growing companies like Masterclass, Notion, and BetterUp unlock sustainable revenue through content and SEO.

We’re obsessed with impact— it’s foundational to who we are, why we’re successful, and how we approach delivering outcomes for clients and ultimately, everyone on the internet.

We’re looking for a fully remote Content Specialist who will be responsible for creating and prioritizing our content and editorial strategies in collaboration with Graphite’s Growth Leads and external content, product, design, and executive teams by providing editorial, creative, and technical support to the team members.

This role requires you to be organized, detailed, resourceful, creative, and naturally inclined toward logistics and planning.

You are eager to be the best at what you do. You are obsessed with learning and developing new skills. You feel comfortable taking full ownership of your projects and working in a performance-driven environment while cultivating a strong sense of teamwork and collaboration.

We are a fully distributed company with team members located across North America, Latin America, and Europe.

Come join us and help us create the best content, everywhere that matters!

This is a fully remote work opportunity.

What you’ll do:

 - Support the creation of cross-platform content strategies that embody the client’s objectives and desired brand identity.

 - Own the research and development of Content Briefs and topic ideas for article production.

 - Provide editorial, creative, and technical support to team members.

 - Maintain a content marketing calendar that schedules all aspects of the creation and delivery of content for each client, and ensure the content team is on board.

 - Support the process of copy optimization, writing copy that is optimized for SEO while remaining entertaining and informative.

 - Stay abreast of current best practices in the industry and review competitor websites to compare their activities with those of your company.

 - Cooperate with the content and growth marketing team to create web content and monitor its effectiveness over time.

What you’ll need:

 - Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or STEM field.

 - Excellent English written and verbal communication skills.

 - Ability to create and publish engaging content that establishes or supports company and brand goals.

 - Expertise in using SEO best practices to write creative copy that includes effective keyword placement.

 - Highly computer literate and knowledgeable of HTML.

 - Experience with social media engagement strategies and best practices.

 - Strong technical knowledge of G Suite.

How we’ll help:

Graphite’s mission is to create an environment where you build the best work of your career. In order to facilitate this, we provide:

 - Process As Needed - We view the process as a way to empower better work, not as a series of dogmatic rules. We develop the best internal processes as we do products - through iteration, measurement, and continuous improvement.

 - Autonomy - We trust you to be excellent at what you do. We will provide as much support as needed when needed, but no more. You will have autonomy and agency to drive projects forward, and own decisions and outcomes.

 - Flexible Work Environment - Everyone’s optimal work style is unique. We operate as a distributed team across the US, Canada, Latin America, and Europe. We optimize for productivity and performance, not time spent in an office. Help us build an optimal work environment that fits you as an individual.

 - Compensation - We want to work with the best people in the World and compensate accordingly.

 - Vacation & Time Off - In order to be the best version of yourself, you need time to recharge. We offer flexible PTO. Take the time when you need it.

 - Benefits - We will ensure you have quality healthcare coverage and opportunities to further your education.

source_jobs.title: Editor
source_jobs.description:
Graphite is a technology-enabled growth agency that helps fast growing companies like Masterclass, Notion, and BetterUp unlock sustainable revenue through content and SEO. We’re obsessed with impact— it’s foundational to who we are, why we’re successful, and how we approach delivering outcomes for clients and ultimately, everyone on the internet. We are a fully distributed company with team members located across North America, Latin America, and Europe. Come join us and help us create the best content, everywhere that matters.



We’re looking for an Editor who is a team player who is intrinsically motivated, creative, whip-smart, talented, open to feedback, and proactive. A sense of humor is a plus! This is a fully remote position. 



What you’ll do 

 - Work directly with a team of editors to deliver high-quality SEO content in a fast-paced environment

 - Meet monthly deliverable deadlines

 - Edit up to 80 articles per month on a variety of topics to ensure grammar, keywords, voice, style, flow, organization, and development to create compelling and interesting content

 - Develop a deep understanding of clients’ style guides, editorial guidelines, and overall SEO expectations.

 - Manage 4–5 writers as they each craft 10–20 articles per month

 - Provide constructive and timely feedback to writers, emphasizing lifelong learning and growth



What you’ll need

 - 3+ years of experience writing and/or editing articles in a journalism or SEO content setting

 - Strong capacity for both logical and creative thinking

 - Excellent time management skills

 - Excellent verbal and written communication skills

 - Organized, detail-oriented, and able to multi-task/prioritize

 - Thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment
   
   

How we’ll help

Graphite’s mission is to create an environment where you build the best work of your career. In order to facilitate this, we provide:



 - Process As Needed - We view the process as a way to empower better work, not as a series of dogmatic rules. We develop the best internal processes the same way we develop products - through iteration, measurement, and continuous improvement.

 - Autonomy - We trust you to be excellent at what you do. We will provide as much support as needed when needed, but no more. You will have autonomy and agency to drive projects forward, and own decisions and outcomes.

 - Flexible Work Environment - Everyone’s optimal work style is unique. We operate as a distributed team across the US, Canada, Latin America and Europe. We optimize for productivity and performance, not time spent in an office. Help us build an optimal work environment that fits you as an individual.

 - Compensation - We want to work with the best people in the World and compensate accordingly.

 - Vacation & Time Off - In order to be the best version of yourself, you need time to recharge. We offer flexible PTO. Take time when you need it.

 - Benefits - We will ensure you have quality health care coverage and opportunities to further your education.
   
   

Graphite provides equal employment opportunities to all qualified individuals without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, pregnancy, age, national origin, physical or mental disability, military or veteran status, genetic information, or any other protected classification.

source_jobs.title: Operations Analyst – Sales Support
source_jobs.description:
Graphite is a technology-enabled growth agency that helps fast-growing companies like Masterclass, Notion, and BetterUp unlock sustainable revenue through content, SEO, and AEO.

We are a fully distributed company with team members located across North America, Latin America, and Europe.

We’re looking for a sharp, analytical, and detail-oriented Operations Analyst to support our Sales team. This is a full-time role reporting to our Director of Sales. This role requires you to be resourceful, commercially sharp, and proactive, making Sales Support a strategic engine that helps partners win faster and more consistently.

At its core, this role is about one thing: turning data and research into clear, high-quality analysis and deliverables that help the Sales team move faster and smarter. You’ll be working across SEO audits, competitive research, strategy decks, and project roadmaps, all with the precision and polish our clients expect.

This is a full-time, long-term, and fully remote opportunity.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Conduct competitive analyses to identify key growth opportunities, including page type analysis, topic gaps, content strategy, and site structure

 - Audit client websites to identify the highest-impact SEO/AEO initiatives across technical, content, internal linking, and information architecture

 - Develop ROI models, internal linking diagnostics, and other strategic analyses to support recommendations and business cases

 - Build client-ready strategy decks and executive overviews that clearly communicate findings, priorities, and recommended initiatives

 - Produce deliverables that are accurate, insight-driven, and presentation-ready with exceptional attention to detail


WHAT YOU’LL NEED

 - Exceptional attention to detail—client-ready means client-ready: no typos, no sloppy formatting, no loose ends

 - Deadline-driven—you hit your dates, flag blockers early, and never leave a team hanging

 - Strong deck and document-building skills—you can translate complex analysis into clear, polished Google Slides and Sheets

 - Project management skills—you can track and coordinate multiple workstreams at once without dropping the ball

 - Analytical mindset—you’re comfortable working with data, spotting patterns, and turning insights into actionable recommendations

 - Having SEO experience is definitely a huge plus

 - Clear written and verbal communication in English


HOW WE'LL HELP

Graphite's mission is to create an environment where you can build the best work of your career. To facilitate this, we provide:

 - Process As Needed: We view the process as a way to empower better work, not as a series of dogmatic rules. We develop the best internal processes the same way we develop products - through iteration, measurement, and continuous improvement.

 - Autonomy: We trust you to be excellent at what you do. We will provide as much support as needed, but no more. You will have autonomy and agency to drive projects forward and own decisions and outcomes.

 - Flexible Work Environment: Everyone's optimal work style is unique. We operate as a distributed team across the US, Canada, Latin America, and Europe. We optimize for productivity and performance, not time spent in an office. Help us build an optimal work environment that fits you as an individual.

 - Compensation: We want to work with the best people in the World and compensate accordingly.

 - Vacation & Time Off: To be the best version of yourself, you need time to recharge. We offer flexible PTO. Take time when you need it.

 - Benefits: We will ensure you have quality healthcare coverage and opportunities to further your education.
   

Graphite provides equal employment opportunities to all qualified individuals without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, pregnancy, age, national origin, physical or mental disability, military or veteran status, genetic information, or any other protected classification.

source_jobs.description:
Graphite is a technology-enabled growth agency that helps fast-growing companies like Masterclass, Notion, and BetterUp unlock sustainable revenue through content, SEO, and AEO.

We seek an experienced Growth Director (SEO + AEO + Content) to lead growth strategies for high-growth tech companies. You will develop and execute SEO, AEO, content, and conversion optimization strategies to drive business results for our partners. Success requires strong problem-solving skills, creativity, and ownership of complex, large-scale projects.



This opportunity is full-time and fully remote, offering the flexibility to work from home.

Come join us and help us create the best content, everywhere that matters!



What you’ll do:

• Lead growth strategies for consumer tech companies.

• Own execution of web and app SEO/AEO projects.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to achieve targets.

• Present insights and outcomes to executives.

• Develop data-driven, scalable content solutions.



What expertise you’ll need:

• 6+ years of technical and programmatic SEO experience or 6+ years of Digital Marketing experience with a keen interest in SEO.

• Strong leadership and communication skills.

• Proficient in data analysis and growth marketing tools (Google Analytics, SEMRush, Ahrefs).

•Experience with user acquisition and product development for web and mobile platforms.
